title: Support organic production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support organic production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare materials, tools and equipment for organic production work

pcs.text: Identify required materials, tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify required materials, tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify required materials, tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Check tools and equipment and report faults to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check tools and equipment and report faults to supervisor?

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report work health and safety hazards.
